title: Magic Ingredients Mod
description: A mod that adds more ingredients and ways to get them.
body:
A mod that **adds** new **ingredients** to minecraft.
This mod is **ment** to be **used** in **modpacks** and has **no** use on its **own**.

New **items** and how to **obtain** them:
- iron needle item -> shaped crafting with two iron nuggets
  
- crimson leech item -> breaking nether wart block
- warped leech item -> breaking warped wart block
  
- phial item -> shaped crafting with 7 glass
- crimson leech phial item -> shapeless crafting 1 phial item and 1 crimson leech item
- warped leech phial item -> shapeless crafting 1 phial item and 1 warped leech item
- piglin brute blood phial item -> right click on piglin brute with an iron needle in hand and phial item in inventory
- vex soul phial item -> right click a vex with a phial item in your hand
- wind phial item -> shapeless crafting with 1 phial item and 1 wind charge
- storm phial item -> right click on a breeze projectile with a phial item in your hand

If you want the source code, just send me a message.

Feel free to use in modpacks.
